Keyboard Shortcuts.desc: View command history in a UI panel
Interrupt or cancel the currently running command
Delete from the cursor to the start of the line
Delete from the cursor to the end of the line
Move the cursor one word at a time

Help & Discovery.desc: Show help for a specific command
Show examples for a specific command
List all available cmdlets, aliases, and functions
List all command aliases (e.g., ls -> Get-ChildItem)
Show properties and methods of an object

File & Directory Navigation.desc: Print the current working directory (Alias: pwd)
Create a new file or directory (Alias: ni)
Delete a file or directory (Alias: rm, del)
Copy files or directories (Alias: cp, copy)
Move or rename files or directories (Alias: mv, move)
Check if a file or directory exists

File Content & Text.desc: Read and output file contents (Alias: cat)
Write text to a file (overwrites existing content)
Search for text within files (Alias: grep)

System & Processes.desc: Kill a process by name (Alias: kill)
Start a new process or program

Networking.desc: Make an HTTP request (Alias: curl, wget)
